answers: CI/CD = Continuous Integration / Continuous Deployment. Automate building, testing, and deploying code on every commit.
CI = merge code often, run automated tests. CD = automatically deploy passed builds to staging/production.
Tools: GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins, CircleCI, Travis CI. GitHub Actions is easiest to start with.
CI/CD benefits: catch bugs early, deploy faster, reduce manual work, and increase confidence in releases.
